chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. Const. Petition No. S- 39 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Fresh case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 136/2023 (stay) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025. Mr. Hajjan Khan Advocate/associate of Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ******************** This petition is filed against Judgment and Decree 23.01.2023 passed by learned District Judge//(MCAC) Ghotki in Family Appeal No.08/2022 filed by petitioner while maintaining Judgment and Decree dated 09.02.2022 passed by Family Judge, Ghotki in Family Suit No.74/2021 filed by respondent No.1. Though intimation notice was issued to counsel representing respondent No.1, today learned counsel has put his appearance and states that he has no instructions from the petitioner since long therefore he has nothing to say in the matter. In view of such statement of counsel for petitioner, this petition is dismissed for want of instructions. JUDGE Irfan/PA 2
